text.value: The canonical URL for an Implementation Guide must point directly to the implementation guide resource, not to the Implementation Guide as a whole

Conformance resource /github/workspace/fsh-generated/resources/ImplementationGuide-openhie.fhir.rwanda.hiv.json - the canonical URL (http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv/ImplementationGuide/openhie.fhir.rwanda.hiv) does not match the URL (http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv)
Resource id/url mismatch: openhie.fhir.rwanda.hiv/http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv
URL Mismatch http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv/ImplementationGuide/openhie.fhir.rwanda.hiv vs http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv

Conformance resource /github/workspace/fsh-generated/resources/StructureDefinition-HIV-lab-order.json - the canonical URL (http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv/StructureDefinition/HIV-lab-order) does not match the URL (http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv/ImplementationGuide/openhie.fhir.rwanda.hiv.json/StructureDefinition/HIV-lab-order)

URL Mismatch http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv/StructureDefinition/HIV-lab-order vs http://openhie.org/fhir/rwanda-hiv/ImplementationGuide/openhie.fhir.rwanda.hiv.json/StructureDefinition/HIV-lab-order
